zh.lifeSummary: 當Sarah Blake於1656年出生在美國麻薩諸塞州素福爾可波斯頓時，她的父親Edward Blake30歲，母親Patience Pope24歲。她於1684年8月5日與Richard Talley在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓洛維爾 米爾斯結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1697年8月5日在她的家鄉享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sarah Blake于1656年出生在美国马萨诸塞州素福爾可波斯頓时，她的父亲Edward Blake30岁，母亲Patience Pope24岁。她于1684年8月5日与Richard Talley在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可波斯頓洛維爾 米爾斯结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1697年8月5日在她的家乡享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: Blake
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish (England and central Scotland): variant of Black 1, meaning ‘swarthy’ or ‘dark-haired’, from a byform of the Old English adjective blæc, blac ‘black’, with change of vowel length.

English: nickname from Middle English blak(e) (Old English blāc) ‘wan, pale, white, fair’. In Middle English the two words blac and blāc, with opposite meanings, fell together as Middle English blake. In the absence of independent evidence as to whether the person referred to was dark or fair, it is now impossible to tell which sense was originally meant.
English (Norfolk): nickname from Middle English bleik, blaik>, blek(e) (Old Norse bleikr) ‘pale or sallow’ (in complexion).

variants.name: Bleak
meanings: English: mostly a variant of   Blake  , but perhaps also of   Blick  . This form of the surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Black
meanings: English and Scottish: chiefly from Middle English blak(e) ‘black’ (Old English blæc, blaca), a nickname given from the earliest times to a swarthy or dark-haired man. However, Middle English blac also meant ‘pale, wan’, a reflex of Old English blāc ‘pale, white’ with a shortened vowel. Compare Blatch and Blick . With rare exceptions it is impossible to disambiguate these antithetical senses in Middle English surnames. The same difficulty arises with Blake and Block .
Scottish: in Gaelic-speaking areas this name was adopted as a translation of the epithet dubh ‘dark, black-(haired)’, or of various other names based on Gaelic dubh ‘black’, see Duff .

Americanized form (translation into English) of various European surnames directly or indirectly derived from the adjective meaning ‘black, dark’, for example German and Jewish Schwarz and Slavic surnames beginning with Čern-, Chern- (see Chern and Cherne ), Chorn-, Crn- or Czern-.

variants.name: Blaikie
meanings: Scottish: nickname from a pet form of   Blake  .

variants.name: Blakes
meanings: English: variant of Blake , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

nameMeanings.name: Sarah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the wife of Abraham and mother of Isaac. According to the Book of Genesis, she was originally called Sarai (possibly meaning ‘contentious’ in Hebrew), but had her name changed by God to the more auspicious Sarah ‘princess’ in token of a greater blessing (Genesis 17:15, ‘And God said unto Abraham, As for Sarai thy wife, thou shalt not call her name Sarai, but Sarah shall her name be’). This has been one of the most enduringly popular girls' names.

variants.name: Sara
meanings: Variant of   Sarah .  This is the form used in the Greek of the New Testament (Hebrews 11:11).

en.lifeSummary: When Sarah Blake was born in 1656, in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, United States, her father, Edward Blake, was 30 and her mother, Patience Pope, was 24. She married Richard Talley on 5 August 1684, in Lower Mills, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died on 5 August 1697, in her hometown, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sarah Blake est née en 1656, à Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, États-Unis, son père, Edward Blake, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Patience Pope, avait 24 ans. Elle a épousé Richard Talley le 5 août 1684, à Lower Mills, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 5 août 1697, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 41 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sarah Blake 1656 in Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edward Blake 30 und ihre Mutter Patience Pope 24. Sie hat am 5. August 1684 in Lower Mills, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Richard Talley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 5. August 1697 im Alter von 41 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Blake è nata il nel 1656 nel Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America, sua padre, Edward Blake, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Patience Pope, aveva 24 anni. Lei sposato Richard Talley il 5 agosto 1684, nel Lower Mills, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì il 5 agosto 1697, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 41 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sarah Blakeが1656年にアメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州スフォルクボストンで生まれた時，父Edward Blakeは30歳，母Patience Popeは24歳であった。1684年8月5日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクボストンロウエル ミルズでRichard Talleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1697年8月5日に故郷で41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sarah Blake(이)가 1656년 미국 매사추세츠 주 수폴크 보스턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edward Blake(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Patience Pope(은)는 24세였다. 그녀는 1684년 8월 5일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 보스턴 로어 미스에서 Richard Talley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1697년 8월 5일 그녀의 고향에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sarah Blake nasceu em 1656, em Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América, seu pai, Edward Blake, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Patience Pope, tinha 24 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard Talley em 5 de agosto de 1684, em Lower Mills, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 5 de agosto de 1697, em sua cidade natal, com 41 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sarah Blake родилась в 1656 г. в местности бостон, суффолк, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты, её отцу по имени Edward Blake было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Patience Pope, 24. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard Talley 5 августа 1684 г. в местности лоуир миллс, бостон, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла 5 августа 1697 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 41 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sarah Blake nació en 1656, en Boston, Suffolk, Masachusets, Estados Unidos, su papá, Edward Blake, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Patience Pope, tenía 24 años. Se casó con Richard Talley el 5 de agosto de 1684, en Lower Mills, Boston, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió el 5 de agosto de 1697, en su pueblo, a la edad de 41 años.
